report.summary: This project contains 9 security issues, all categorized as MALICIOUS_CODE, with a severity of medium. The issues relate to exposing internal representation by returning references to mutable objects in various Java files.

critical_issues.issue_description: May expose internal representation by returning reference to mutable object
May expose internal representation by incorporating reference to mutable object
May expose internal representation by returning reference to mutable object
May expose internal representation by incorporating reference to mutable object
May expose internal representation by returning reference to mutable object

recommendations: Review the affected Java files to identify and fix the security issues.
Consider refactoring the code to avoid exposing internal representation by returning references to mutable objects.
Implement additional security measures to prevent potential vulnerabilities.
next_steps: Prioritize fixing the identified security issues and re-run the security scan to ensure the fixes were effective.
Continuously monitor the project for potential security vulnerabilities and perform regular security scans.
Consider conducting a code review to identify and address any additional security concerns.

Class defines equals() and uses Object.hashCode()

vulnerability_suggestions.issue: Exposing internal representation of mutable object

fix.code: public UserDTO getUserDTO() { return new UserDTO(user); }
fix.explanation: Replace the return type with an immutable object or a DTO to prevent exposure of internal representation.

vulnerability_suggestions.best_practice: Use immutable objects or DTOs to prevent exposure of internal representation.

fix.code: public UserDTO getUserDTO() { return new UserDTO(user); }
fix.explanation: Replace the return type with an immutable object or a DTO to prevent incorporation of reference to mutable object.

vulnerability_suggestions.best_practice: Use immutable objects or DTOs to prevent incorporation of reference to mutable object.

vulnerability_suggestions.issue: Exposing internal representation of mutable object

fix.type: create a copy of the object
fix.code: public SignupRequestDTO getSignupRequestDTO() { return new SignupRequestDTO(signupRequest); }
fix.explanation: Create a copy of the object to prevent exposure of internal representation.

vulnerability_suggestions.best_practice: Create a copy of the object to prevent exposure of internal representation.

fix.type: create a copy of the object

fix.type: create a copy of the object

vulnerability_suggestions.best_practice: Create a copy of the object to prevent incorporation of reference to mutable object.

fix.explanation: Override the equals and hashCode methods to ensure consistent behavior.
